# Sarevista

> The screen-location memory map. Sarevista is not a filming-locations directory — it turns every movie, series, and book you love into a personal map of real places you've been and places to go next.

Sarevista pairs a global catalogue of verified screen and page locations with a personal layer that no other filming-locations site offers: a passport that fills in as you visit, tier badges, a fog-of-war world map, curated walking trails and one-day drives, and an AI concierge that scouts locations from natural-language prompts ("quiet cafés from Before Sunrise", "Peaky Blinders pubs in Birmingham"). Books, series, and films sit on the same map — from Middle-earth to Middle England — so the loop from watching to visiting to remembering happens in one place.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Discover filming locations and your cinematic memory map.
- [Discovery Map](/map): Interactive world map of filming locations.
- [Add a Title](/add): Submit a new title and its filming locations.
- [About](/about): What Sarevista is and who builds it.
- [Our Story](/our-story): How Sarevista started.
- [Travel Guides](/guides): Itineraries built around films, series, and novels.
- [Destinations](/destinations): Browse filming spots by country and city.
- [Community](/community): Contributors and how to get involved.
- [Help Center](/help): FAQs and support.
- [Contact](/contact): How to get in touch.
